name: Fuchsian group for {7,3} tiling
description: The orientation-preserving subgroup of the (2,3,7) triangle group acting on the Poincaré disk

alpha.description: Translation along a {7,3} edge (glide between adjacent heptagons)

beta.description: Rotation of order 7 about a heptagon center

gamma.description: Rotation of order 3 about a vertex

relations: α·β·γ = identity (fundamental group relation for quotient surface)

fundamentalDomainPolygon.description: A 14-gon fundamental polygon (from the {7,3} tiling, quotiented by group)
fundamentalDomainPolygon.identification: Opposite sides identified by generators α and α^{-1}, etc.

quotientSurface.description: The torsion-free quotient of index 168 gives the Klein quartic (genus 3)
quotientSurface.name: Klein quartic

discreteness.condition: Poincaré's theorem: group generated by reflections of a polygon with angle sums 2π/k
